# CWE-620: Unverified Password Change (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-620-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Password string
}

// Safe: requires knowledge of the current password before updating.
func ChangePassword(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Username        string `json:"username"`
		CurrentPassword string `json:"current_password"`
		NewPassword     string `json:"new_password"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var acct Account
	if err := db.Where("username = ?", body.Username).First(&acct).Error; err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if bcrypt.CompareHashAndPassword([]byte(acct.Password), []byte(body.CurrentPassword)) != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	hash, _ := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(body.NewPassword), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	db.Model(&acct).Update("password", string(hash))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
